_about: Curator title→discipline map for the cross-discipline over-merge re-mint. When a flagged M-ID's normalized title contains a key (substring match, lowercased), the split assigns the mapped MQ discipline to ALL members and KEEPS THE M-ID WHOLE (one piece, no division/subject split) — these are single courses whose TOP/subject varies by college (the title is the ground truth). This is the durable home for the domain calls the TOP/subject/description cascade can't make. Discipline values are exact MQ discipline names (verified against discipline_canonical_subj4.json). Seeded 2026-05-29 from Sam's dry-run review notes; grows as curation continues.
_generated_by: seeded by hand from curator review notes
_match: substring, case-insensitive, against the M-ID common_title
